subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 21/25] server41tests: test cross-directory rename ADD notification on target

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a test case to the server41tests suite in the NFSv4.1 implementation. The test, called 'testDirDelegCrossRenameTarget', verifies that when a file is renamed across directories, an ADD notification is sent to the target directory's delegation. This behavior is specified in RFC 8881bis Section 27.4.6. The test creates a source directory and file, obtains a delegation on the target directory, renames the file into the delegated directory, and then checks that the correct notifications were sent.
